criteria.criterion: GET /api/status ollama.running reflects real process state
HTTP ping timeout >2s treated as not running, no exception
PUT /api/config writes config to disk (JSON file)
First start with no config file returns empty object {}
Write failure returns 500, no silent data loss
Port occupied: startServer() rejects with 'Port X is already in use'
Multiple startServer() calls don't cause port conflict via singleton
Tests can independently start/stop server instances without state leak
